samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="signal_generator">
    <description>Triangle Wave Signal Generator</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <output id="wave" width_description="[4:0]">5-bit output waveform signal representing the generated waveform.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state name="STATE_IDLE" value="0">Initial state where the waveform increments.</state>
        <state name="STATE_DEC" value="1">State where the waveform decrements.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="state" width="1" initial_value="0">State register controlling the waveform generation.</register>
        <register id="wave" width="5" initial_value="0">Waveform register representing the generated waveform.</register>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        Always block triggered on the positive edge of the clock signal (posedge clk) or the negative edge of the reset signal (negedge rst_n):
        if (~rst_n) begin
            // Reset state and wave registers
            state <= 1'b0;
            wave <= 5'b0;
        end else begin
            // State machine logic
            case (state)
                STATE_IDLE: begin
                    // Increment wave
                    wave <= wave + 1;
                    if (wave == 5'd31) begin
                        state <= STATE_DEC;
                    end
                end
                STATE_DEC: begin
                    // Decrement wave
                    wave <= wave - 1;
                    if (wave == 5'd0) begin
                        state <= STATE_IDLE;
                    end
                end
            endcase
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
```
